---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
plot(cars)
```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Cmd+Option+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Cmd+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file). 

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(wms)
```

```{r}
df_ground <- read.csv('../example/filtered/103_203.csv')
df_board <- read.csv('../example/filtered/108_208.csv')
```


```{r}
pitch_ground <- ts(df_ground$pitch)
eye_ground <- ts(df_ground$eyebrow)

pitch_board <- ts(df_board$pitch)
eye_board <- ts(df_board$eyebrow)
```

```{r}
srate = 500
len_ground <-length(pitch_ground)
time_ground <- seq(0, (len_ground - 1)/srate, by = 1/srate)

len_board <-length(pitch_board)
time_board <- seq(0, (len_board - 1)/srate, by = 1/srate)
```

WMS Ground

```{r}
wms_ground <- win_ms_synch(pitch_ground, eye_ground,
                         srate          = srate,
                         win            = 200,
                         minfreq        = 0.1,
                         maxfreq        = 10,
                         mincycle       = 5,
                         maxcycle       = 8,
                         nfreqs         = 100,
                         wavelet_length = 4)
```

```{r}
plot_wms(wms_ground,
         show_arrows  = TRUE,
         arrow_n_time = 20,
         arrow_n_freq = 10,
         arrow_scale  = 0.35,
         arrow_min_si = 0.5,
         title_str    = "WMS — Ground")
```
WMS Board

```{r}
wms_board <- win_ms_synch(pitch_board, eye_board,
                         srate          = srate,
                         win            = 200,
                         minfreq        = 0.1,
                         maxfreq        = 10,
                         mincycle       = 5,
                         maxcycle       = 8,
                         nfreqs         = 100,
                         wavelet_length = 4)
```

```{r}
plot_wms(wms_board,
         show_arrows  = TRUE,
         arrow_n_time = 20,
         arrow_n_freq = 10,
         arrow_scale  = 0.35,
         arrow_min_si = 0.5,
         title_str    = "WMS — Board")
```
